name: Stripe
diff_text:
PRICING PAGE CHANGE:
- Removed 'Custom' tier from main pricing table
- Added new 'Starter' plan at $0/mo with 10k API calls
- Increased 'Growth' plan from $199/mo to $249/mo
- New banner: 'All plans now include fraud detection'
- Added 'Compare plans' CTA with detailed feature matrix

name: Linear
diff_text:
HOMEPAGE CHANGE:
- Hero headline changed from 'The issue tracker for high-performance teams' to 'The project management tool for modern software teams'
- Removed 'issue tracker' from all H1/H2 tags
- Added new 'Roadmaps' section in product screenshots
- New logos added: Vercel, Loom, Retool (replaced older logos)
- CTA button text changed from 'Start for free' to 'Get started — it's free'

name: Notion
diff_text:
CHANGELOG UPDATE (2024-01-15):
- New feature: 'Notion AI Connectors' - connect Slack, Google Drive, GitHub
- AI can now search across connected apps in natural language
- Pricing note: AI Connectors included in Business plan ($16/user/mo)
- Beta: 'Notion Forms' for collecting structured data
- Performance: 40% faster page loads announced
